purpose: Shared Playwright e2e helper (app/tests/e2e/helpers/group-setup.ts) that drives the app's real add-contact deep-link path (page.goto('/add#c='+npub)) and then the invite-contact-select picker, replacing every spec's former direct invite-npub-input fill now that InviteMemberModal (S2) only exposes a contact picker.

public_api.name: seedContact
public_api.description: Navigates page to /add#c=<npub> (the production add-contact deep link) and waits for either contact-added-success or add-page-error (already_exists) — both mean the contact is present afterward. Idempotent. The only function in the e2e suite permitted to navigate to /add#c=.

public_api.name: inviteContactViaPicker
public_api.description: AC-E2E-1's shared helper: seeds inviteeNpub as a contact via seedContact, returns to the group-detail URL captured at call time, opens InviteMemberModal, waits for the seeded contact's <option> to attach to invite-contact-select, selects it, and clicks invite-submit-btn. Does not assert the outcome (invite-success/invite-error) — left to the caller, matching pre-existing per-spec variance.

public_api.name: createGroupAndInvite
public_api.signature: (alicePage: Page, inviteeNpub: string, bobPage: Page, groupName: string) => Promise<void>
public_api.description: Unchanged external signature (pre-existing, S3 only changed its internals to call inviteContactViaPicker instead of filling invite-npub-input directly) — creates a group, invites+seeds the invitee via the picker, and waits for the invitee to accept and join.

owned_data: None — test-only orchestration over the app's own localStorage/IndexedDB via real page navigation; no data owned outside test runtime
dependencies_allowed: app UI surfaces reached only via page navigation/DOM interaction (never direct import of app source)
dependencies_forbidden: Direct import of app/src/** production modules (contacts.ts, InviteMemberModal.tsx, i18n.ts are frozen inputs to this story)
external_ports: Playwright Page.goto('/add#c=' + npub) — the production add-contact deep link, same one a real user's card-share/QR tap triggers
Playwright Page DOM interaction with invite-member-btn / invite-contact-select / invite-submit-btn (S2's picker surface)
test_targets: 23 mechanically-updated specs (see result.json files_modified) — every one of the 25 specs that previously drove invite-npub-input directly, minus the two bespoke files listed above
